sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 3분기 매출은 163억 달러로 전년 대비 성장했으며, 소프트웨어 10%·인프라 17% 성장이 주도했다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출은 163억 달러로 전년 대비 성장했으며, 소프트웨어 10%·인프라 17% 성장이 주도했다.
모든 세그먼트에서 성장이 가속되어 매출·이익·잉여현금흐름 모두 예상을 상회했으며, IBM은 연간 매출 성장 및 잉여현금흐름 전망을 상향 조정했다.
AI 수주잔고가 95억 달러를 넘어섰으며, CEO Krishna는 AI가 고객 운영 생산성 향상을 실제로 견인하고 있다고 강조했다.

businessChanges.text: 소프트웨어 세그먼트 매출 72억 달러로 9% 성장했으며, 자동화 부문이 두 자릿수 이상 급성장이 돋보였다.
컨설팅 세그먼트 매출 53억 달러로 완만한 성장에 그쳤고, 인프라 세그먼트 매출 36억 달러로 17%(불변환율 15%) 성장했다.

financialHighlights.text: GAAP 매출총이익률 57.3%(1.1포인트 개선), 비GAAP 매출총이익률 58.7%(1.2포인트 개선)를 기록했다.
연간 누적(YTD) 기준 영업활동 현금흐름 92억 달러, 잉여현금흐름 72억 달러를 창출했다.

watchItems.text: 컨설팅 성장 둔화가 이어지는 가운데, AI 수주잔고 95억 달러의 실제 매출 전환 속도가 핵심 관전 포인트다.
자동화·데이터 부문의 고성장이 지속 가능한 구조적 수요인지, 아니면 단기 사이클 요인인지 확인이 필요하다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 ibm-20251022xex991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 IBM RELEASES THIRD-QUARTER RESULTS Acceleration in revenue growth and profit across all segments; Raises outlook for full-year revenue growth and free cash flow ARMONK, N.Y., October 22, 2025 . . . IBM (NYSE: IBM) today announced third-quarter 2025 earnings results. “This quarter we accelerated performance across all of our segments, and again exceeded expectations for revenue, profit and free cash flow. Clients globally continue to leverage our technology and domain expertise to drive productivity in their operations and deliver real business value with AI. Our AI book of business now stands at more than $9.5 billion," said Arvind Krishna, IBM chairman, president and chief executive officer. "Given the strength of our business, we are raising our full-year outlook for revenue growth and free cash flow.” Third-Quarter  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.5 billion = 95억 달러; $9.5 = 9.5달러.

• Revenue – Revenue of $16.3 billion, up 9 percent, up 7 percent at constant currency – Software revenue up 10 percent, up 9 percent at constant currency – Consulting revenue up 3 percent, up 2 percent at constant currency – Infrastructure revenue up 17 percent, up 15 percent at constant currency • Profit – Gross Profit Margin: GAAP: 57.3 percent, up 1.1 points; Operating (Non-GAAP): 58.7 percent, up 1.2 points – Pre-Tax Income Margin: GAAP: 14.9 percent, up 20.2 points; Operating (Non-GAAP): 18.6 percent, up 2.0 points • Cash Flow – Year to date, net cash from operating activities of $9.2 billion; free cash flow of $7.2 billion THIRD - QUARTER 2025 INCOME  Normalized numeric aliases: $16.3 billion = 163억 달러; $9.2 billion = 92억 달러; $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $16.3 = 16.3달러; $9.2 = 9.2달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러; $9.4 = 9.4달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $1.84 = 1.84달러; 2 percent = 2%; 14.9 percent = 14.9%; 17 percent = 17%; 15 percent = 15%; 57.3 percent = 57.3%; 58.7 percent = 58.7%; 18.6 percent = 18.6%.

9 % (1) 11 % 1.1 Pts NM (3) 20.2 Pts (3) NM (notes 2 and 3) NM (notes 2 and 3) Operating (Non-GAAP) $ 9.6B 58.7 % $ 3.0B 18.6 % $ 2.5B $ 2.65 Year/Year 11 % 1.2 Pts 22 % 2.0 Pts 17 % 15 % (1) 7% at constant currency. (2) 2025 GAAP results include a one-time, non-cash income tax charge associated with the enactment of H.R. 1 in July of 2025. (3) GAAP YTY results include the impact of a pension settlement charge in third-quarter 2024. NM - not meaningful “New innovation, the strength and diversity of our portfolio, and our disciplined execution led to acceleration in revenue growth and profit in the quarter," said James Kavanaugh, IBM senior vice president and chief financial officer. "Consistent focus on the fundamentals of our business delivered double-digit growth in adjusted EBITDA, and drove another quarter of strong free cash flow, the fuel for our investments and ability to  Normalized numeric aliases: $9.6 = 9.6달러; $3.0 = 3.0달러; $2.5 = 2.5달러; $2.65 = 2.65달러.

value to shareholders.” Segment Results for Third Quarter • Software — revenues of $7.2 billion, up 10 percent, up 9 percent at constant currency: – Hybrid Cloud (Red Hat) up 14 percent, up 12 percent at constant currency – Automation up 24 percent, up 22 percent at constant currency – Data up 8 percent, up 7 percent at constant currency – Transaction Processing down 1 percent, down 3 percent at constant currency • Consulting — revenues of $5.3 billion, up 3 percent, up 2 percent at constant currency: – Strategy and Technology up 2 percent, flat at constant currency – Intelligent Operations up 5 percent, up 4 percent at constant currency • Infrastructure — revenues of $3.6  Normalized numeric aliases: $7.2 billion = 72억 달러; $5.3 billion = 53억 달러; $3.6 billion = 36억 달러; $7.2 = 7.2달러; $5.3 = 5.3달러; $3.6 = 3.6달러; 10 percent = 10%; 9 percent = 9%; 12 percent = 12%; 1 percent = 1%; 17 percent = 17%; 59 percent = 59%; 15 percent = 15%; 28 percent = 28%; 26 percent = 26%; 61 percent = 61%.
